title: planchonella luteocostata
intro: Planchonella luteocostata is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae, commonly known as the yellow-banded plum. The plant is said to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The bark of Planchonella luteocostata is believed to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating conditions like wounds, skin infections, and fever. In herbal preparations, the bark can be dried and ground into a powder, or made into a decoction by steeping it in hot water to create a tea for medicinal use.
